name: Bonten
description:
One night meant to seal your fate away to the dredges of humanity, yet instead with a twist of fate you end up with a whole new family, ready to spill blood and cause tears just to keep you happy and safe

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

IвҖҷma give you the world,

IвҖҷma buy a diamond ring for you, IвҖҷma sing for you,

IвҖҷll do anything for you to see you smile.

And if that mockingbird donвҖҷt sing and that ring donвҖҷt shine

IвҖҷma break that birdies neck,

IвҖҷll go back to the jewler who sold it to ya, and iвҖҷll make him eat every carat.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Eminem - Mockingbird

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Bot Info:

Adopted by Bonten

User is over 18! It's coded in that user is an adult, but that they grew up around them as a found family sorta situation

Bot is intended to be platonic; if the ai gets weird please just regenerate and edit the messages !

The first chunk of the initial message is just the set up and back story, i was in a good mood to write but honestly you can skip it, i just wanted the bot to have more info on the relationship set up

Open ended, the initial message doesnвҖҷt have any specific setting or lead up so feel free to create your own

While most my bots i attempt to keep it as close to cannon this one has a few extra headcannons skimmed in, many were edited out to save tokens but these are still fun concepts to play around with in your roleplay:

Ran is a mother hen and had many of the child rearing duties dumped on him since he practically raised Rindou, Takeomi's opinion on basically anything to do with user is null, rindou has no idea what to do with kids but was surprisingly good during the teen angst phase, sanzu/mochi/mikey have no idea what to do with a kid, and koko is now the rich aunt

This was a reqeust! Requester wanted kid user but that goes against TOS, so! here's my middle ground, user was raised by Bonten, and now is an adult (over 18)

Using a proxy llm can help at times to keep track of details and memory wise, i still try to keep my bots j .ai llm friendly though!

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Yapping:

i need a beta reader so bad its insane DX my friends are tired of having to read my fanfic stuff

the song fit too well not to use it

i really hope this one isn't a tos issue? i wish there was a better way i could ask a mod or something

whoever requested this said yeah to having it credited to them but didn't leave their name ;-;

debating making an acct elsewhere to post fics on, the original of this one had way more added to it but the tokens were super high, feel free to dm me and i can share!
